name: task-created-governance
summary: Log new task creation to .claude/task-log.jsonl for governance / audit trail.
when_to_use: Enterprise environments needing an audit trail of what Claude was asked to do.
script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
I=$(head -c 65536)
jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1 <<<"$I" || { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
MSG=$(jq -r '.message // ""' <<<"$I" | head -c 500)
T=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
mkdir -p .claude
(flock -x 200; jq -n --arg t "$T" --arg m "$MSG" '{ts:$t,type:"notification",message:$m}' >> .claude/task-log.jsonl) 200>/tmp/cc-task-log.lock
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
verify: Trigger any notification; confirm a JSON line appended to .claude/task-log.jsonl.
